calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-28-2008 Granted Per Written Order

To Overcome Presumption Of Disqualification Under P.C. 21350
Off Calendar Jul-22-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Milton Katz for the Petitioner/Personal Representative.

There being no objection, the Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth CSR#5162. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy B. Mann.

Petition To Enforce Order Of September 1, 2006, Approving Final Account And Requiring The Public Admin. To Prepare Tax Returns On Behalf Of The Conservatorship Estate
Off Calendar Feb-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator. Milton for the Petitioner.

The Court still can't see why there is a need to retain funds. Mr. Ferdon stated that Mr. Motak never did an accounting, that the SFPA was responsible for all taxes, that they needed to wait for the statutory period before releasing the funds, and that there was no assurance of taxes being owed. Mr. Katz stated that it had been two years since the conservatroship had been closed, that no more records had been found, that they were willing to hold the SFPA harmless for any tax liability, and that he saw no reason for holding the funds. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-30-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Milton Katz appearing for executor. Jonathan Ferdon appearing for special administrator. Mr. Katz is objecting to the fees for Mr. Ferdon and the Public Administrator. Fees issue and reserve issue argued. Matter submitted. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

MINI MINUTES: appearences: jonathan ferdon; milton katz
public administrator objects to petition
matter taken under submission
judge: john dearman, clerks:ella yip & larrisa dotson, reporter:teanna ward, csr 11918

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-09-2006 Continued To Mar-22-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Jonathan Ferdon appearing for the Public Administrator. Mr. Katz is not in court. Mr. Ferdon told the court that the Public Guardian was not the conservator when the will was executed. Mr. Motak was the conservator at that time. Mr. Motak was later removed and the Public Administdrator was reinstated. He is requesting a continuance. He wants to call Mr. Katz for a continuance date. He will notify the clerk of the continuance date. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
